pr.title: docs(go): update MiMo
pr.body:
## Summary
- update MiMo-V2.5-Pro and add MiMo-V2.5 in the Go limits graph
- align MiMo request estimates with the corresponding DeepSeek pricing while keeping MiMo token patterns slightly higher
- remove the obsolete MiMo-V2.5 context-tier label and sync all localized Go docs

## Validation
- `git diff --check`
- `bun typecheck` from `packages/console/app`
- `bun run build` from `packages/web`
- push hook: `bun turbo typecheck`
- verified MiMo estimates remain below their paired DeepSeek estimates

## Operational Follow-up
- Updated `frank` Go model secret configuration separately so both MiMo models copy their paired DeepSeek single-tier cost settings and no longer have `cost200K`.
- `production` Go model secrets are intentionally not changed by this PR and must be updated before publishing these public estimates.
pr.author: MrMushrooooom

pr.title: docs(go): update MiMo
pr.body:
## Summary
- update MiMo-V2.5-Pro and add MiMo-V2.5 in the Go limits graph
- align MiMo request estimates with the corresponding DeepSeek pricing while keeping MiMo token patterns slightly higher
- remove the obsolete MiMo-V2.5 context-tier label and sync all localized Go docs

## Validation
- `git diff --check`
- `bun typecheck` from `packages/console/app`
- `bun run build` from `packages/web`
- push hook: `bun turbo typecheck`
- verified MiMo estimates remain below their paired DeepSeek estimates

## Operational Follow-up
- Updated `frank` Go model secret configuration separately so both MiMo models copy their paired DeepSeek single-tier cost settings and no longer have `cost200K`.
- `production` Go model secrets are intentionally not changed by this PR and must be updated before publishing these public estimates.
pr.author: MrMushrooooom
